params.exactAmountsIn: Exact amounts of underlying tokens to add
params.wethIsEth: Whether to treat WETH as ETH
params.wrapUnderlying: Array indicating which tokens to wrap

returns.funcs: The function selectors implemented by the facet.

returns.interfaces: The interface IDs implemented by the facet.

facetMetadata().details: Exposed to allow for single call retrieval of all facet metadata.

returns.functions: The function selectors implemented by the facet.
returns.interfaces: The interface IDs implemented by the facet.

addLiquidityERC4626PoolProportionalHook(.notice: Hook for proportional add liquidity to ERC4626 pools.

addLiquidityERC4626PoolUnbalancedHook((a.notice: Hook for unbalanced add liquidity to ERC4626 pools.

addLiquidityProportionalToERC4626Pool(ad.notice: Add liquidity to an ERC4626 pool proportionally.

addLiquidityUnbalancedToERC4626Pool(addr.notice: Add liquidity to an ERC4626 pool with unbalanced amounts.

facetFuncs().notice: Declares the function selectors implemented by the exposing facet for use in a composing proxy.

facetInterfaces().notice: Declares the interfaces implemented by the exposing facet for use in a composing proxy.

facetMetadata().notice: Declares comprehensive metadata about the exposing facet.

facetName().notice: Declares a canonical nonunique name for the exposing facet.

getSender().notice: Get the first sender which initialized the call to Router.

queryAddLiquidityProportionalToERC4626Po.notice: Query add liquidity to an ERC4626 pool proportionally.

queryAddLiquidityUnbalancedToERC4626Pool.notice: Query add liquidity to an ERC4626 pool with unbalanced amounts.

queryRemoveLiquidityProportionalFromERC4.notice: Query remove liquidity from an ERC4626 pool proportionally.

removeLiquidityERC4626PoolProportionalHo.notice: Hook for proportional remove liquidity from ERC4626 pools.

removeLiquidityProportionalFromERC4626Po.notice: Remove liquidity from an ERC4626 pool proportionally.
